series_metadata.series_description: Contains permits, permit applications, permits to install and receip files.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Continually maintain and update microfilm in operating area ; Paper: Retain 5 years in operating area. Destroy data deemed not useful. Microfilm data that is deemed useful and destroy hardcopy after microfilm is checked for quality and completeness, Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper
